reference: Hi, thank you for asking. I really appreciate your concern. If the lump that you noticed does not hurt, then the chances of it being a lipoma are very likely, at least based on the history provided here. Otherwise, a medical examination would be needed for a final diagnosis. Hope this information helps you. Have a good day.
text: Hi, thank you for asking. I really appreciate your concern. If the lump that you notice does not hurt, then the chances of it being a lipoma are very likely, at least based on the history provided here. Otherwise, a medical examination would be needed for a final diagnosis. Hope this information helps you. Have a good day.
